subcodes.first_line: My sorrow is not for what hath befallen My soul. By God! Bahá doth not shrink from tribulations; nay, He hath found solace in them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لیس حزنی فیما ورد علی نفسی تالله ان البهاء لایجزع عن البلایا انه انس بها فی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @murder; causing physical harm
